final:
// // This module controls the fan speed based on the temperature input. It has a 3-bit temperature input (T[2:0]) and a 2-bit output (F[1:0]). The fan speed is determined as follows: If T > 2, F = 00 (Fan On); if 1 <= T <= 2, F = 01 (Medium Speed); if 0 <= T < 1, F = 10 (High Speed). The system operates on the falling edge of the clock.
module fan_speed_control(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input [2:0] T,
    output reg [1:0] F
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
        F <= 2'b00; // Fan Off
    end else begin
        case (T)
            3'b000, 3'b001, 3'b010: F <= 2'b00;  // Fan Off
            3'b011, 3'b100, 3'b101: F <= 2'b01;  // Low Speed
            3'b110, 3'b111: F <= 2'b10;          // High Speed
            default: F <= 2'b00;                  // Default to Off
        endcase
    end
end

endmodule
